name: On Edge
title: On Edge
text: Next negative event costs 1 additional Drive. Discard after triggered.

name: Bad Feeling
title: Bad Feeling
text: Next negative event costs 1 additional Drive. Discard after triggered.

name: Dread
title: Dread
flavor: Something is wrong. You don't know what.
text: Next negative event costs 1 additional Drive. If holding no Luck when drawn: lose 1 Drive immediately also. Discard after triggered.

name: Stumble
title: Stumble
flavor: You lose time. You lose ground.

name: Panic
title: Panic
flavor: Just for a moment. Long enough.

name: Intrusive Thought
title: Intrusive Thought
text: Discard one Luck at random. If holding no Luck: lose 1 Drive instead. Discard.

name: Dropped
title: Dropped
flavor: You don't notice until it's too late.
text: Discard one item at random. If holding no items: lose 2 Drive instead. Discard.

name: Heavy Legs
title: Heavy Legs
flavor: The road is longer than it was.
text: Next Drive restoration reduced by 1, minimum 0. Discard after triggered.

name: Wrong Turn
title: Wrong Turn
text: Push back 1 Road card. Resolve if repeating event. Skip if one-time cleared. Discard.

name: Frozen
title: Frozen
flavor: You know what you should do. You can't do it.
text: Cannot use, spend, or discard Luck cards until next event fully resolved. Discard after event.
